metadata.title: Haseloff Software Solutions – Software that sells.
metadata.description: We build websites, web apps, and mobile apps for businesses across Germany. React, Next.js, TypeScript – strategically designed, cleanly built, measurably successful. Free initial consultation.

hero.title: Software that
hero.subtitle: We build digital products for businesses that mean it. No templates. No half-measures.

projects.title: Our Work
projects.subtitle: Selected Projects
projects.projectsIntro: Every project is custom-built. No templates, no copy-paste – only solutions that fit the business.

services.title: What we deliver
services.subtitle: Three disciplines. One outcome: software that moves your business forward.

web.title: Web Apps & Websites
web.description: Fast, scalable web applications that win and retain customers. From strategic landing pages to complex business platforms – built to convert.

app.title: Mobile Apps
app.description: Apps that users love and don't delete after a week. Native performance, thoughtful UX, seamless integration with your existing systems.

custom.title: Custom Systems
custom.description: Backend architectures, APIs, and automations that make your team faster. Less manual work, more growth.

clarity.title: Results over ego.
clarity.description: We don't build software to impress ourselves. Every decision serves one goal: measurably moving your business forward. No feature bloat, no over-engineering.

quality.title: Built to last.
quality.description: We deliver code that works just as well in 3 years as it does on launch day. Thoughtful architecture, clean patterns, zero technical debt.

responsibility.title: No ghosting.
responsibility.description: The real work starts after launch. We support, optimize, and scale – because good software evolves, it doesn't collect dust.

contact.title: Let's start
contact.subtitle: Your project deserves more than a standard agency. Tell us what you're planning – the rest is our job.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24h.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or email kontakt@haseloff-solutions.de directly.

validation.emailRequired: We need your email to reply
validation.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email
validation.messageRequired: Tell us briefly what it's about

blogPreview.title: From the Blog
blogPreview.subtitle: Thoughts on software development, process, and what actually matters.

ctaBanner.title: Great software doesn't build itself.
ctaBanner.subtitle: Tell us about your project. First consultation is free, no strings attached.

thankYou.title: Message sent!
thankYou.message: Thanks for reaching out. We'll review your inquiry and get back to you within 24 hours.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.vatNumber: VAT identification number according to § 27 a VAT Act: [VAT ID]

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: The protection of your data matters to us. We process your data exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR, TKG 2003).

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller is Haseloff Software Solutions, Breite Straße 7, 39288 Burg OT Detershagen.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.text: When visiting our website, general information is automatically collected (server log files): browser type, operating system, access time, and similar.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: Our website only uses technically necessary cookies for basic site functions.

contact.title: Contact Form
contact.text: Your data from the contact form is stored by us for processing the inquiry. We will not share this data without your consent.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right to information, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, revocation, and objection.

duration.question: How long does a project take?
duration.answer: A professional website: 3–5 weeks. A web app with backend: 2–4 months. After the initial call, we give you a binding timeline with clear milestones – no surprises.

cost.question: What does it cost?
cost.answer: Websites start at €2,500, apps and complex systems from €10,000. You get professional code that lasts for years – not a WordPress theme that falls apart after 6 months. Tell us what you have in mind.

technologies.question: What technologies do you use?
technologies.answer: React, Next.js, and TypeScript for frontends. React Native for mobile. Node.js and PostgreSQL for backends. All proven, future-proof, and used by major teams worldwide – no experimental hype stuff.

maintenance.question: What happens after launch?
maintenance.answer: 3 months of free support included. After that, maintenance contracts from €150/month. Monitoring, updates, performance optimization – we don't leave you alone with your product.

process.question: How does a project work?
process.answer: Initial call (free) → Fixed-price proposal → Concept & design → Development with weekly updates → Launch & ongoing support. You're in the loop at every step.

support.question: How fast do you respond?
support.answer: Within 24 hours, usually faster. For critical issues, also by phone. Because waiting days for a reply is unprofessional.

contact.title: More questions?
contact.description: Get in touch. First consultation is free.
